content:
```python
import openpyxl
from openpyxl.chart import BarChart, Reference
from openpyxl.styles import Font

def solve(input_file, output_file):
    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(input_file)
    ws = wb.active

    # Create a chart
    chart = BarChart()
    data = Reference(ws, min_col=2, min_row=1, max_col=3, max_row=10)
    chart.add_data(data, titles_from_data=True)

    # Set the font for chart labels
    font = Font(name="Credit Suisse Type Light")
    chart.title = "Monthly Report"
    chart.title_font = font
    chart.x_axis.title = "Months"
    chart.x_axis.title_font = font
    chart.y_axis.title = "Values"
    chart.y_axis.title_font = font

    ws.add_chart(chart, "E5")
    wb.save(output_file)
```
